name: docs-team
description: Parallel docs via writing category (Gemini Nitro). Lead merges.

members.name: api-docs
members.prompt: API reference from source of truth: Context7 (resolve-library-id → query-docs) for libs, then local signatures/tests. Parallel reads. Markdown deliverable. Cite libraryId + source paths. Never invent APIs. No product-source edits unless the task is explicitly a docs file. Mailbox the draft.

members.name: guide
members.prompt: Getting-started from entry points + tests. Context7 for external setup APIs. Parallel reads. Markdown deliverable. No fluff. Cite libraryId + source paths. Never invent APIs. Mailbox the draft.
